context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements a Square POS catalog sync module, using the right Square client package, environment configuration, catalog object structure, and handling of Square-assigned IDs.

checklist.name: Square npm package
checklist.description: Imports Client and/or Environment from the 'square' package (not a different Square SDK or HTTP client wrapper)

checklist.name: Environment switching
checklist.description: Sets Square environment to Environment.Production when NODE_ENV is 'production' and Environment.Sandbox otherwise

checklist.name: Description truncation
checklist.description: Truncates catalog item description to 500 characters (e.g. substring(0, 500) or slice(0, 500))

checklist.name: Hash-prefix new IDs
checklist.description: Uses a '#' prefix on catalog object IDs when constructing new CatalogObject payloads (e.g. '#item_...' or '#var_...')

checklist.name: Batch upsert method
checklist.description: Calls catalogApi.batchUpsertCatalogObjects (not individual upsertCatalogObject per item)

checklist.name: Idempotency key
checklist.description: Passes an idempotencyKey to batchUpsertCatalogObjects (not absent or empty)

checklist.name: ID mapping persistence
checklist.description: Reads result.idMappings from the batchUpsertCatalogObjects response and stores the Square-assigned variation IDs back to the internal SKU or product record

checklist.name: Track inventory flag
checklist.description: Sets trackInventory: true on item variations in the CatalogObject payload

checklist.name: Price in minor units
checklist.description: Converts price to minor currency units (cents) for priceMoney.amount (e.g. multiplies by 100)

checklist.name: Catalog as sync target
checklist.description: Syncs FROM the commerce/PIM catalog TO Square (not the reverse direction — Square is populated from the existing product data)
